title: Codex TUI Startup Guardrail
problem: Interactive Codex TUI startups can skip the normal verification flow, so stale patch or remote-control state is only noticed after the session has already started.
gates: manual interactive TUI smoke on direct startup

continue_policy.notes: Continue while the startup readiness prompt remains the target. Split capability-matrix, response-fixer, GUI wizard, or protocol-normalizer follow-ons into separate lanes.
